title: Fix Contact Administrator Error on View Selection
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to select views like 'Lender Decision' without getting a 'Contact Administrator' error, so that I can access my data without interruption.
description:
## Bug
Selecting 'Lender Decision' view in the Cardiff account triggers a 'Contact Administrator' error page.

## Root Cause
A database seeder had not fully updated the public-facing ERD view IDs in the production table, leaving some views without valid IDs.

## Fix
Re-ran the seeder to populate all public-facing ERD view IDs correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Selecting any view does not produce a Contact Administrator error
All ERD views have valid public-facing IDs in the database
ux_changes: Fixed error page when selecting certain views.
data_model_changes: Re-ran seeder to populate missing public-facing ERD view IDs in production.
implementation_notes: The GUID migration seeder did not complete for all records in production. Re-running the seeder fixed the missing IDs.
comment_summary: Developer identified that the seeder had not updated all public-facing ERD view IDs in production and re-ran it.
